menu.title: What would you like to record?
menu.subtitle: Welcome to Capture Studio. Please select one of the following to begin your recording.
menu.privacy: This is a demo of in-browser recording using core Web APIs. Download or clear anytime — the blob is ready to submit in any API payload.
menu.desktopOnlyScreen: Screen recording requires a desktop browser.

permissions.enumerating: We are currently enumerating your devices, please allow access to your camera and microphone.
permissions.microphoneDenied: Permission denied to access the microphone.
permissions.cameraDenied: Permission denied to access the camera.
permissions.screenDenied: Permission denied to access the screen.
permissions.reload: Allow browser permissions and reload the page to proceed.
permissions.deviceIdsHint: Device IDs appear random until the browser has permission to read device names.

settings.videoQualityHint: Screen recording uses the resolution you pick in the share dialog.
settings.qualityRestartToast: Camera will restart to apply the new quality setting.

toolbar.stopMinLength: Recording must be at least 1 second long
toolbar.discardAndReturn: Discard recording and return to menu
toolbar.waitCountdown: Please wait for the countdown to finish
toolbar.discardDescription: This will remove your saved recording and return to the menu.
toolbar.clearDescription: This removes the recording saved in this session.
toolbar.restartDescription: Starting a new recording will discard the current one.
toolbar.cameraActive: Camera preview is active and ready to record.

confirm.leaveDescription: Your recording will be lost if you go back.
confirm.discardRecordingDescription: Starting a new recording will discard the current one.

createAnnouncement.success: Recording saved—you can leave and return without losing it.

notifications.countdownStart: Hang tight! Recording will start in 3 seconds.
notifications.timeLimitReached: You've reached the recording time limit. Thank you and enjoy your recording.
notifications.screenShareEnded: Screen sharing stopped. Your recording has been saved.
notifications.canvasPrimeTimeout: Preview took too long to start. Recording may begin with a brief delay.
notifications.recorderUnsupported: Unable to start the recorder in this browser. Try a different browser or recording mode.
notifications.streamReadyAudio: Audio stream is ready! You can start recording now. Click the red button to start recording.
notifications.streamReadyVideo: Camera stream is ready! You can start recording now. Click the red button to start recording.
notifications.streamReadyScreen: Screen stream is ready for recording! Please return to the Capture Studio tab to start recording.
notifications.streamReadyScreenVideo: Screen with camera stream is ready for recording! Please return to the Capture Studio tab to start recording.
notifications.nudgeReminder: Reminder: Please start your recording by pressing the red button on the recorder page.
notifications.nudgeHello: Hello, recording hasn't started yet. Please press the red button on the recorder page to begin.

errors.boundaryTitle: Something went wrong with the recorder
errors.boundaryDescription: Reload the page to reset camera, microphone, and screen capture permissions.

countdown.title: Recording countdown
countdown.description: Recording will start when the countdown finishes. Press Escape or Cancel to abort.
